action.reasoning: Observation: GPU 0 has 15.75GB free; loading Pi0 in fp32 went up to 14.5GB then OOM moving to GPU. GPU 1 is fully free (33GB). Should use GPU 1 for smoke test, and load directly in bf16 via torch_dtype. Decision: Use GPU 1 explicitly via CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES, avoid contention.
